caption: A man with a tall, spiked grey wig, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio setting. He wears a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and brown suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background is a wall covered in numerous small, framed photographs and posters. On-screen logos appear on the left and right sides of the frame; the left side features a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and the right side reads "BOSS TALK 101". As the sequence progresses, the man is seen speaking, with his mouth open and his head shifting slightly. His expression is focused as he engages in a conversation, though he remains seated in the same position throughout the clip while the camera maintains a static medium shot.
